body_txt: When a character audibly sniffs another character or something that would carry their scent, indicating they have an unhealthy and often very creepy attraction to them. Usually smelling hair or discarded articles of clothing. See also Smells Sexy , Perverted Drooling , and Lecherous Licking . See also Fetishes Are Weird . Please use editorial caution with Real Life examples and limit them to cases widely reported in the news by reliable sources. Extra caution is warranted due to the Sex Tropes rule to not give Real Life examples for sexual issues.
